texto: We must work toward cyber doctrine that reflects the wisdom of free markets, private competition, and the important but limited role of government in establishing and enforcing the rule of law, honoring the rights of personal property, the benefits of free and fair trade, and the fundamental principles of liberty.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Thomas Bossert sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “We must work toward cyber doctrine that reflects the wisdom of free markets, private competition,…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, work, law, útil em momentos de trabalho e law.
